# rs-grid

> High-performance Rust/WASM data grid engine for the web

## nav.docs

- [Getting Started](/getting-started.md): Install rs-grid and render your first data grid.

## Others

- [ColumnDef API](/api/column-def.md): Column definition, cell formats, and cell editors.
- [GridCommand API](/api/grid-command.md): Complete reference for all GridCommand variants.
- [GridModel API](/api/grid-model.md): Complete reference for the GridModel struct.
- [GridState API](/api/grid-state.md): Complete reference for the GridState struct.
- [ScenePrimitive API](/api/scene-primitive.md): Reference for all scene primitive types used by renderers.
- [Theme API](/api/theme.md): Complete reference for the Theme struct with all fields and defaults.
- [Architecture](/concepts/architecture.md): Unidirectional pipeline from GridState to canvas.
- [Data Model](/concepts/data-model.md): GridModel structure — columns, data sources, patches, and row mapping.
- [Grid State & Commands](/concepts/grid-state.md): The central state machine and command-driven mutation model.
- [Selection](/concepts/selection.md): Anchor/focus selection model for cells, rows, and columns.
- [Viewport](/concepts/viewport.md): Viewport virtualization — only visible cells are rendered.
- [Virtual Data (FnDataSource)](/data/fn-datasource.md): Closure-based virtual data source with zero memory footprint.
- [Data Sources Overview](/data/overview.md): The DataSource trait and the three built-in implementations.
- [Server-Side Data (PageCacheDataSource)](/data/page-cache.md): Async page-based data loading with LRU caching and skeleton placeholders.
- [In-Memory Data (VecDataSource)](/data/vec-datasource.md): Vec-backed data source for small to medium datasets.
- [Docker](/deployment/docker.md): Build and deploy the documentation site with Docker.
- [Testing](/development/testing.md): Unit tests, end-to-end tests with Playwright, and visual regression.
- [Development Workflow](/development/workspace.md): Workspace structure, build commands, and development tools.
- [rs-grid](/docs-overview.md): High-performance Rust/WASM data grid engine for the browser.
- [Cell Formatting](/features/cell-formatting.md): Number, currency, percentage, boolean, image, and custom cell formats.
- [Columns](/features/columns.md): Column definitions, resizing, moving, pinning, and auto-fit.
- [Context Menu](/features/context-menu.md): Right-click context menu with built-in and custom actions.
- [Editing](/features/editing.md): Inline cell editing with text input and select dropdown editors.
- [Filtering](/features/filtering.md): Per-column text filtering with case-insensitive matching.
- [Hit-Testing](/features/hit-testing.md): O(log n) pointer-to-cell resolution for clicks and hover.
- [Keyboard Navigation](/features/keyboard.md): Arrow keys, selection extension, editing shortcuts, and focus model.
- [Localization](/features/localization.md): Translate the grid UI into any language with built-in locale files or custom translations.
- [Rows](/features/rows.md): Row records, row height, row number gutter, hover, and alternating backgrounds.
- [Scrollbars](/features/scrollbars.md): Custom-rendered scrollbars with arrow buttons, thumb drag, and track click.
- [Search](/features/search.md): Full-text cell search with Ctrl+F, match navigation, and highlights.
- [Selection & Clipboard](/features/selection-clipboard.md): Copy, cut, and paste operations with TSV format.
- [Sorting](/features/sorting.md): Column sorting with ascending, descending, and none states.
- [Undo & Redo](/features/undo-redo.md): Reversible actions with a fixed-capacity history stack.
- [Validation](/features/validation.md): Per-column cell validation with CellValidator — reject invalid edits before they are committed.
- [Installation](/installation.md): Set up your Rust toolchain and add rs-grid to your project.
- [Custom Renderer](/integrations/custom-renderer.md): Build a new rendering backend by consuming SceneFrame primitives.
- [Leptos Integration](/integrations/leptos.md): Drop-in GridCanvas component for Leptos CSR applications.
- [Vanilla JS Integration](/integrations/vanilla-js.md): Using rs-grid from plain JavaScript with wasm-pack.
- [Row Count Limits](/row-count-limits.md): History of row count limits across rs-grid versions.
- [Scene Primitives](/scene/primitives.md): The five primitive types that make up a SceneFrame.
- [Scene Builder](/scene/scene-builder.md): Converting GridState into a renderable SceneFrame.
- [Built-in Themes](/theming/built-in-themes.md): Light, Dark, Material 3, and Material 3 Dark themes.
- [CSS Variables Reference](/theming/css-variables.md): Complete reference for all --rs-grid-* CSS custom properties.
- [Theming Overview](/theming/overview.md): How the CSS-to-Theme pipeline works in rs-grid.
